name: @tootallnate/ms-adpcm
description: Pure-JS decoder for Microsoft ADPCM (also known as MS-ADPCM or WAVE_FORMAT_ADPCM, wFormatTag = 0x0002), the 4-bit lossy audio codec used by Windows-era CD-ROM games and several Final Fantasy HD Remaster ports. Parses the standard RIFF/WAVE container with its MS-ADPCM extension (predictor coefficient table, per-block header), decodes to interleaved s16 PCM, and re-encodes as a standard PCM WAV ready for the HTML5 <audio> element.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
